label: fa_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog + DialogContent
Local useState per field → useForm({ resolver: zodResolver(faCreateSchema) }) with FA code regex V01 and max-length V02 wired as Zod rules
window.NPD_FAS.some() duplicate check → unique constraint on fa_code in Drizzle schema, surface as setError after Server Action rejects
Inline alert-blue → shadcn Alert with AlertDescription; redirect URL constructed client-side after mutation success
Add Server Action with RBAC guard (role: npd_manager)
Hardcoded 'FA5600' range comment → next-intl key npd.fa_create.range_hint

label: brief_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog + DialogContent; template radio-card grid → RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem styled as custom cards
Local useState → useForm with zod; devCode regex /^DEV\d{4}-\d+$/ becomes z.string().regex()
Number(volume) > 0 validation → z.coerce.number().positive()
Mock redirect comment → router.push after Server Action success; emits brief.created outbox event
Hardcoded labels 'DEV26-052' → remove default, let backend assign next sequence
Add Server Action with RBAC guard (role: npd_manager | npd_technologist)
known_bugs: BL-NPD-01: Brief schema fields C21-C37 are placeholder-labeled — full rescan pending Phase B.2

label: brief_convert_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='wide' → Dialog with max-w-2xl className on DialogContent
Pre-populated table of fields from brief → read-only Summary rendered from Server Component that joins brief + fa_defaults query
Duplicate FA code check on input → debounced Server Action checkFaCodeAvailable; show FormMessage on conflict
Convert action → Server Action convertBriefToFA that: sets brief.status='converted', creates FA row, locks brief; wrap in DB transaction
Alert-amber locking note → shadcn Alert variant='warning' with AlertDescription
Add RBAC guard (role: npd_manager only); emit brief.converted + fa.created outbox events on success

label: dept_close_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; dept-based checklist hardcoded in prototype → derive from Server Action getRequiredFieldsForDept(faCode, dept) querying actual FA row
Checklist rendering (pass/fail icons) → map over server-returned field check results; boolean ok value comes from null checks in DB query
allPass = items.every() gate → Server Action closeDeptSection rejects with 400 if any required field is null
Optional closing note → audit_events table insert with note, actor, timestamp on close
Add RBAC guard per dept (e.g. dept=Core only npd_manager; dept=Technical only technologist/qa)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys npd.dept_close.required_check, npd.dept_close.cannot_close

label: d365_build_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal + MFA 6-digit input → Dialog; MFA verification moves to TOTP Server Action validateMfaCode(userId, code); lockout counter stored server-side (rate limit table)
Hardcoded hint '424242' → remove from production; use real TOTP (e.g. speakeasy or Clerk MFA)
Mock setTimeout build simulation → background job (e.g. BullMQ task) triggered by Server Action buildD365Output; return jobId for polling
Summary rows from window.NPD_FAS → query FA row in Server Component; pass as prop to Client Component modal
attempts >= 3 lockout → Redis-backed rate limiter per userId+action; expose remaining attempts via API response
Add RBAC guard (role: npd_manager); emit fa.d365_build_triggered outbox event

label: version_compare_modal
translation_notes: window.NPD_FORMULATION_VERSIONS → query formulation_versions table filtered by fa_code; fetch in Server Component
Two select dropdowns (Version A / B) → shadcn Select; onChange triggers client-side diff recompute from pre-fetched version list
Row diff highlight (#FFFBEB background) → Tailwind conditional bg-yellow-50 when field values differ
Changed? badge → shadcn Badge variant for amber/neutral; derive from String comparison of field values
Modal size='wide' → Dialog max-w-3xl; consider replacing with Sheet for side-panel diff on wider viewports
Hardcoded field list (Status, Items count, Allergens, Effective from/to, Created by) → derive from formulation_versions schema columns

label: risk_add_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; create/edit mode detected by data?.risk prop → single form supporting both, Server Action upsertRisk(faCode, riskId?, payload)
Local likelihood/impact state with nmap score calculation → derive risk score in Server Action or Drizzle computed column; show live preview via useMemo on client
Textarea char limits (300 desc, 500 mitigation) → z.string().max(300) and z.string().max(500) in Zod schema
scoreBadge CSS class selection → shadcn Badge with variant prop mapped from score threshold
Owner freetext input → consider ComboBox against users list for structured references
Add RBAC guard (role: npd_manager | npd_technologist); emit risk.created / risk.updated audit event

label: fa_delete_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal dismissible={false} → Dialog with onPointerDownOutside e.preventDefault() and no X close button
Type-to-confirm input → controlled Input with zod refinement: z.string().refine(val => val === faCode)
Related data bullet list (dynamic counts) → pre-fetch counts via Server Component before opening: getProdDetailCount, getFormulationVersionCount etc.
btn-danger class → shadcn Button variant='destructive'
Delete action → Server Action deleteFA with cascade soft-delete; revert Brief status; archive audit history; emit fa.deleted event
Add RBAC guard (role: npd_manager only); double-confirm pattern is correct — keep dismissible=false
known_bugs: BL-PROD-05: .btn-danger missing from shared.css — falls back to primary styling in prototype; must wire Button variant='destructive' in production shadcn theme

label: allergen_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; allergen + current status passed as props → also pass from Server Component that fetches fa_allergen_overrides row
include/exclude toggle buttons → shadcn ToggleGroup with two ToggleGroupItem; map to DB enum 'contains' | 'absent'
ReasonInput primitive → Textarea with min-length validation (z.string().min(10).max(500))
Save override → Server Action saveAllergenOverride that writes to fa_allergen_overrides table with actor+timestamp; triggers cascade refresh; emit allergen.override_set event
Read-only allergen/current fields → Input readOnly with bg-muted class
Alert about audit trail → shadcn Alert; message driven by next-intl key npd.allergen_override.audit_warning

label: d365_wizard_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal + Stepper → Dialog max-w-4xl; Stepper → custom StepIndicator component built on shadcn primitives (Steps from cmdk pattern) or build with flex + Separator
8-step state machine with step/done Set → useReducer with step FSM; each step renders a separate sub-component for testability
Auto-advance execute step via useEffect + setInterval → server-sent event (SSE) stream from Next.js route handler; client subscribes with useEventSource
MFA step → same TOTP Server Action as d365_build_modal; share validation hook
BOM preview, allergen, N+1 tables → pre-fetched in parallel via Promise.all in Server Component before modal opens; passed as props
D365 constants table → query d365_constants table in Server Component; render read-only in step 5
Build execute steps ('Generating...') → map over SSE progress events; final step sets fa.built=true in DB
dismissible={exec < 6} → Dialog onPointerDownOutside conditional based on SSE job status

label: version_save_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size='sm' → Dialog max-w-sm
Version label regex /^v\d+\.\d+$/ → z.string().regex() in Zod schema
Save action → Server Action createFormulationDraft(faCode, label); clones latest version rows into new draft
Hardcoded label default 'v0.4' → auto-suggest next semantic version from last version in DB
Add RBAC guard (role: npd_technologist | npd_manager)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys npd.version_save.label_help, npd.version_save.title

label: formulation_lock_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal dismissible={false} → Dialog with onPointerDownOutside prevention; no close button
btn-danger → shadcn Button variant='destructive'
ReasonInput (min 10 chars) → Textarea with z.string().min(10) validation
Lock action → Server Action lockFormulationVersion(faCode, version, reason); sets status='locked', writes to audit_events
Summary rows (Version, FA, Status before/after) → read from props passed by parent Server Component
Alert-amber destructive warning → shadcn Alert variant='warning'; clarify that 'locked' is irreversible

label: doc_upload_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog; file input simulated as text in prototype → replace with shadcn Input type='file' or drag-drop zone (react-dropzone)
Document type select → shadcn Select with options from doc_types reference table
Upload action → Server Action uploadComplianceDoc: presign S3/Vercel Blob URL, then store metadata in fa_docs table
20MB limit → validate on client (FileReader.size) and enforce on server (Content-Length check)
FA identifier passed as prop → include fa_code in upload metadata for linkage
Add RBAC guard (role: npd_manager | technologist | qa)

label: npd_dashboard
translation_notes: window.NPD_FAS filter/reduce for KPI tiles → aggregate Drizzle queries in Server Component: COUNT(*) WHERE built=FALSE, COUNT(*) WHERE status='Complete', etc.
4 KPI cards with colored border → shadcn Card with Tailwind border-b-4 border-{color} pattern; extract to reusable KpiCard component
Department progress table (window.NPD_DEPT_SUMMARY) → LEFT JOIN fa_dept_status grouped by dept in Server Component
Launch alerts table with row-level RAG coloring → Tailwind conditional bg-red-50 / bg-yellow-50 based on days_left thresholds; sort by days_left ASC in Drizzle query
showBuilt checkbox → client-side useState; toggle does not refetch — pre-fetch both built and active rows
Polling every 30s (BL-NPD-04) → not prototyped; production uses SWR with refreshInterval:30000 or SSE
known_bugs: BL-NPD-04: WebSocket/polling for 30s refresh not prototyped — static render only

label: fa_list
translation_notes: window.NPD_FAS in-memory filter → Drizzle query with WHERE clause built from search/status/dept params; use nuqs for URL-synced filter state
Table view with 15-column dept icon grid → standard shadcn Table; dept status icons (deptIcon helper) → extract DeptStatusIcon component with tooltip
Kanban view (5 columns) → CSS grid layout; each column filters rows by status; consider react-virtual for large datasets
View toggle (table/kanban) → shadcn Tabs or ToggleGroup; persist preference in localStorage or URL param
Row click → router.push('/npd/fa/[faCode]'); D365 button → openModal trigger via URL state (searchParams modal=d365Build&fa=FA5601)
Empty state → shadcn Table with a single row containing EmptyState component
known_bugs: BL-NPD-03: Role-based field/tab visibility not enforced — all users see all columns

label: fa_detail
translation_notes: TABS array with locked booleans → Next.js App Router nested segments /npd/fa/[faCode]/[tab]; lock enforced server-side by checking coreDone/prodDone from DB before rendering tab
12-tab navigation (subnav-inline) → shadcn Tabs with TabsList + TabsTrigger; locked tabs use opacity-50 + pointer-events-none + Tooltip explaining lock reason
7-dept gate progress strip → extract GateProgressStrip component; each dot derives color from fa.dept[k] status fetched from DB
Two-column layout (1fr 280px) → Tailwind grid grid-cols-[1fr_280px]; right panel sticky
openModal pattern (open named modal with data) → URL search params: ?modal=deptClose&dept=Core; parse in Client Component
fa.built flag resets on edit → implement via Drizzle trigger or Server Action post-save hook that sets built=false
known_bugs: BL-NPD-03: Permissions matrix (spec §2.4) not applied — all tabs visible regardless of role

label: fa_right_panel
translation_notes: FARightPanel with hardcoded V01-V08 validation results → compute validation results server-side in getValidationStatus(fa) helper; pass as prop
icon() switch for pass/fail/warn/info → extract ValidationIcon component with Lucide icons (CheckCircle, XCircle, AlertTriangle, Info)
Built status card with download link → query fa_build_artifacts table for last build; presign download URL in Server Action
Cards stacked vertically in 280px sidebar → shadcn Card; sticky positioning via CSS position:sticky + top value matching navbar height
Validation rules from window.NPD_VALIDATION_RULES → store in constants file or seed table; iterate in Server Component
Hardcoded 'Last build: 2026-04-15 16:21' → format from fa_build_artifacts.created_at using date-fns

label: fa_core_tab
translation_notes: form-grid div → CSS grid 2-col via Tailwind grid grid-cols-2 gap-4; extract FieldGroup component wrapping FormField
fa_code readOnly input with green bg → Input readOnly + className='bg-green-50 font-mono'; add tooltip explaining V01 rule

Finish Meat cascade (comma-separated PR codes → auto-derives RM code + syncs ProdDetail) → implement as onChange Server Action or useEffect that calls deriveFromFinishMeat(value); returns rm_code + triggers ProdDetail row sync
Pack Size select cascade (clears Line + Dieset on change) → React Controller onChange that resets dependent fields via form.setValue
Save Core → Server Action updateFACoreSection(faCode, data); validate with Zod; set built=false on change; emit fa.core_updated event
Close Core button → triggers dept_close_modal or directly calls closeDeptSection Server Action if V05 check passes

label: fa_production_tab
translation_notes: window.NPD_PROD_DETAIL[fa.fa_code] → query prod_detail table WHERE fa_code=? in Server Component; each row is a component
locked = !fa.pack_size gate → disable all inputs via fieldset disabled attribute; show Alert variant='warning' with blocking reason
Process 1-4 / Yield P1-4 four-column grid per component → extract ProcessYieldRow component; 4 Fragment entries with 3 fields each
PR code auto-derived fields (green bg) → Input readOnly + bg-green-50; derive in Server Action from Finish Meat + process sequence
Aggregate summary row for multi-component → compute in Server Component from DB rows; render read-only
V06 badge per component → validate yield_p1..4 chain completeness server-side; expose as component.v06_status field

label: fa_technical_tab
translation_notes: window.NPD_ALLERGEN_CASCADE[fa.fa_code] → query fa_allergen_cascade view (union of rm + process + overrides) in Server Component
14-allergen table with Override button → each row is a Server Component row; Override opens allergen_override_modal via URL param
Contains/May-contain badge chips with manual override border → shadcn Badge + conditional border-amber-400; filter from cascade data
Refresh allergens button → Server Action refreshAllergenCascade(faCode) that re-runs cascade derivation query; invalidates cache via revalidatePath
allAllergens hardcoded list → move to allergen_families reference table seeded from EU FIC 1169/2011 list
FATechnicalTab is split into two Cards → keep two Card components: one for shelf-life fields, one for allergen declaration

label: fa_mrp_tab
translation_notes: D365 material status (found/nocost/missing) per input → query d365_import_cache table WHERE material_code=? for each field; derive status enum
cell() helper with colored badge per status → extract D365StatusInput component: Input + Badge side by side with status color
Refresh D365 cache button → Server Action refreshD365Cache(); updates d365_import_cache from external D365 API or queue
Form grid with 12 material fields → shadcn Form with FormField for each; group by category (Packaging / MRP) with sub-headings
Save MRP → Server Action updateFAMRPSection; validate required fields; emit fa.mrp_updated outbox event
V04 alert → shadcn Alert with color legend matching found/nocost/missing statuses

label: fa_procurement_tab
translation_notes: priceBlocked = !closed_core || !closed_production → gate enforced server-side: Server Action updateFAProcurement rejects if core/production not closed; client mirrors with fieldset disabled
window.NPD_REF.suppliers → query suppliers reference table; populate Select options
Price field disabled with gray bg → Input disabled + className='disabled:bg-gray-200'
V-NPD-PROC-001 alert → shadcn Alert variant='warning'; only rendered when priceBlocked=true (derive from Server Component query)
Save Procurement → Server Action updateFAProcurementSection(faCode, data) with RBAC guard (role: procurement)
Hardcoded defaults (14 days lead time, 60 days shelf life) → no defaults in production; require user entry

label: fa_bom_tab
translation_notes: Hardcoded BOM rows → computed view: query fa_bom_view (union of Core RM, ProdDetail RMs, MRP packaging) in Server Component
D365 status per row (found/nocost/missing) → JOIN with d365_import_cache on material_code; derive status enum in query
Type badge (RM/PM) with different colors → shadcn Badge with variant prop; map RM→blue, PM→violet
Export BOM CSV button → Server Action generateBOMCSV(faCode) returning StreamingResponse or Vercel Blob download URL
Build D365 button disabled when status != Complete → disable prop from Server Component prop; tooltip explains requirement
Read-only note in CardHeader → shadcn CardDescription; clarify that BOM reflects saved DB state (not unsaved form changes)

label: fa_formulations_tab
translation_notes: Formulation versions table + timeline → two Card components; versions from Server Component query formulation_versions WHERE fa_code=?
Version timeline (vertical timeline with dots) → extract VersionTimeline component; locked versions use solid blue dot + border, draft uses amber dashed
Action buttons per row (View, Compare, Lock) → View: router.push to formulation editor; Compare: URL param ?modal=versionCompare; Lock: URL param ?modal=formulationLock&version=v0.3
New draft button → triggers version_save_modal via URL param ?modal=versionSave
Status badge (Locked emoji) → shadcn Badge; emoji lock should be replaced with Lucide Lock icon
Timeline rendering (position:relative, borderLeft) → Tailwind border-l-2 border-blue-500 with relative/absolute positioning for dots

label: fa_history_tab
translation_notes: window.NPD_HISTORY[fa.fa_code] → query audit_events WHERE entity_id=faCode ORDER BY created_at DESC; support filter by event_type
Client-side filter by type → either URL param ?filter=dept_closed or client-side state with pre-fetched events (suitable for <100 events/FA)
Event icon mapping → replace emoji icons with Lucide icons: Plus (create), Edit2 (field_edit), Lock (dept_closed), Zap (built), RotateCcw (built_reset), AlertTriangle (allergen_changed)
Timeline feed layout (flex, borderBottom) → extract AuditEventRow component; consider shadcn ScrollArea for long histories
type badge as mono text → shadcn Badge variant='outline' with monospace font for event type
who + when → format timestamps with date-fns formatRelative or formatDistanceToNow; show full ISO on hover via Tooltip

label: brief_list
translation_notes: window.NPD_BRIEFS in-memory filter → Drizzle query with WHERE status=? AND template=? AND (dev_code ILIKE ? OR product_name ILIKE ?); use nuqs for URL-synced filters
statusBadge helper → extract BriefStatusBadge component; map status to shadcn Badge variant
Table row click → router.push('/npd/briefs/[briefId]'); stop-propagation on action buttons
Convert button (status='complete' only) → opens brief_convert_modal via URL param ?modal=briefConvert&brief=BR-0106
Empty state → full-width TableRow with EmptyState component (shadcn pattern)
Linked FA column as mono → Link to /npd/fa/[faCode] with shadcn Link styling
known_bugs: BL-NPD-01: Brief schema C21-C37 fields pending rescan

label: brief_detail
translation_notes: Two-section tabs (Product details / Packaging) → shadcn Tabs; each tab is a separate Client Component subtree
Converted brief read-only state → derive disabled prop from brief.status='converted' passed from Server Component; show Alert variant='success' with link to FA
Multi-component table with inline editing → useFieldArray from react-hook-form; each row has Input fields; weight total computed via watch()
weightMismatch validation (totalWeight vs 220g target ±5g) → Zod .superRefine on components array; surface as array-level error
C14-C19 packaging fields with fa field mapping hints (ff-help) → shadcn FormDescription below each FormField
C21-C37 placeholder fields → render as disabled Input with badge 'TBD'; scaffold for Phase B.2
Mark complete / Save draft → separate Server Actions; Mark complete runs V-NPD-BRF-001 weight check server-side before status change
known_bugs: BL-NPD-01: C21-C37 fields placeholder-labeled — full rescan pending Phase B.2

label: formulation_list
translation_notes: Cross-FA flattening of formulation versions → Server Component query: SELECT fv.*, fa.fa_code FROM formulation_versions fv JOIN fa ON fv.fa_code=fa.fa_code; synthesized stub rows not needed in production
FA + Status filter selects → URL params with nuqs; FA select options from SELECT DISTINCT fa_code query
Locked badge with emoji → shadcn Badge + Lucide Lock icon; Draft badge → Badge variant='secondary'
Open FA action → router.push('/npd/fa/[faCode]?tab=formulations')
effective_to null → show 'current' label via Tailwind conditional text; consider date-fns format for non-null values
Hardcoded synthesis of stub rows (NPD_FAS without versions) → remove; production shows real data only

label: formulation_editor
translation_notes: Accordion expand/collapse per component → shadcn Collapsible or Accordion; expanded Set state → derive from URL hash or Accordion defaultValue
window.NPD_PROD_DETAIL[fa.fa_code] → Server Component query prod_detail WHERE fa_code=? ORDER BY component_order
Process 1-4 fields per component → same ProcessYieldRow component as fa_production_tab; share component
Auto-save on blur comment → implement via Input onBlur that calls Server Action updateProdDetailRow(rowId, field, value); optimistic UI with rollback on error
Dieset auto-derived (readOnly green bg) → Input readOnly + bg-green-50; derive in Server Action from Line selection
V06 badge per header → reuse V06 validation logic from fa_production_tab; consider shared hook useV06Validation(row)

label: pipeline
translation_notes: window.NPD_PROJECTS in-memory filter → Server Component query npd_projects with WHERE clauses for owner/prio/stage filters; URL params via nuqs
5 KPI tiles (Active, Awaiting approval, Launched YTD, At risk, Avg time) → Server Component aggregates with COUNT/AVG queries; same KpiCard pattern as npd_dashboard
3 view modes (kanban/table/split) → URL param ?view=kanban|table|split; KanbanView / TableView / SplitView imported as separate Client Components
Filter pills (all/mine/brief/recipe/trial/approval) → URL param ?filter=mine; 'mine' requires auth session user match to project.owner
prioBadge helper → extract PriorityBadge shared component; reuse across Pipeline, TableView, SplitView
BL-NPD-02: Legacy pipeline screens coexist with FA-spec screens — align or deprecate in Phase 2
known_bugs: BL-NPD-02: Legacy R&D pipeline screens coexist with new FA-spec screens — merge or deprecate in Phase 2

label: kanban_view
translation_notes: CSS kanban grid with kanban-col + kanban-card classes → Tailwind flex gap-4 overflowX-auto; each col is a flex-col div with min-w-[260px]
window.NPD_STAGES → stages constant array; map to columns
KanbanCard progress bar → shadcn Progress component or Tailwind div with width percentage
prio-{p.prio} CSS class on card → Tailwind conditional border-l-4 border-red-500 for high priority
Card click → router.push('/npd/projects/[id]')
Empty column placeholder → centered muted text; consider react-virtual for large column lists
known_bugs: BL-NPD-02: Legacy pipeline — deprecation pending Phase 2

label: split_view
translation_notes: Split layout (table + sticky detail panel) → CSS grid grid-cols-[1fr_380px] gap-4; detail panel sticky top-16
selId state → URL param ?selected=projectId; parse in Client Component for shareable links
Detail panel shows cost/margin with color → shadcn Card with conditional text-green-600/text-red-600; margin derive from Server Component query
Progress bar in detail panel → shadcn Progress component
TableView selection mode (onSelect prop) → shadcn Table rows with data-selected + bg-blue-50 conditional class
Open project button → router.push('/npd/projects/[id]')
known_bugs: BL-NPD-02: Legacy pipeline — deprecation pending Phase 2

label: create_project_wizard
translation_notes: 4-step wizard (step bar with circles + connectors) → extract WizardStepBar component; circles use Tailwind conditional bg-blue-500/bg-green-500/bg-gray-100
Single form object with field updates via u() helper → useForm with Zod schema partitioned by step; validate current step fields only on Next click
Step 3 starting-point cards (blank/clone/template) → RadioGroup with RadioGroupItem styled as choice cards; same pattern as brief_create_modal template picker
Step 4 review table → read-only shadcn Table with 2 columns; form values passed as props
onComplete(form) → Server Action createNPDProject; create project row + initial recipe draft based on startFrom value; redirect to /npd/projects/[id]/recipe
BL-NPD-02: This wizard is part of legacy R&D pipeline — review whether it merges with FA-spec create flow in Phase 2
known_bugs: BL-NPD-02: Legacy pipeline wizard — merge or deprecate decision pending Phase 2

label: brief_screen
translation_notes: Single-state form object with u() helper → useForm + zodResolver; all fields in one Zod schema
Category select with 5 options → shadcn Select; options from product_categories reference table
Attachments table with emoji file icon → shadcn Table; emoji 📄 → Lucide FileText icon; each row has download + 3-dot menu (DropdownMenu) actions
Upload button → triggers doc_upload_modal via URL param or inline file input with presign flow
Save action → Server Action updateProjectBrief(projectId, data); mark as completed when all required fields filled
BL-NPD-02: This BriefScreen is the legacy R&D pipeline brief — differs from the FA-spec BriefDetail in brief-screens.jsx; reconcile in Phase 2
known_bugs: BL-NPD-02: Legacy pipeline BriefScreen coexists with new BriefDetail — reconcile in Phase 2

label: recipe_screen
translation_notes: useLiveCalc hook (pure memoized computation) → keep as custom hook in production; no server roundtrip needed for live cost/margin calculation
Ingredient list with drag handle → use @dnd-kit/sortable for drag-to-reorder; save order via Server Action updateIngredientOrder(recipeId, orderedIds)
Composition bar (multi-color strip) → Tailwind flex overflow-hidden with dynamic widths; consider recharts BarChart for accessible version
Toolbar (version selector, batch size, compare/save/submit buttons) → sticky top bar; version Select queries recipe_versions for this project
Submit for trial → Server Action submitRecipeForTrial(recipeId) that validates totalPct === 100 and allergens declared; creates trial_run record
Import CSV button → triggers file input + Server Action parseIngredientCSV; map CSV columns to ingredient schema

label: nutrition_panel
translation_notes: NutritionPanel with per-nutrient bar chart → extract NutrientBar component; replicate with Tailwind progress bars or shadcn Progress
Simplified nutrient derivation from meatPct/saltPct → mock only; production uses a nutrition DB lookup (e.g. USDA / Polish IZZ DB) per ingredient + weighted sum
barColor() traffic-light logic → Tailwind conditional bg-green-500/bg-amber-500/bg-red-500 on progress fill
Export label button → Server Action generateNutritionLabelPDF(recipeId) using Puppeteer or @react-pdf/renderer
Targets note at bottom → shadcn CardFooter with next-intl keys for nutrient targets
useMemo dependency on ingredients → keep as-is in production; recompute on every ingredient change

label: cost_panel
translation_notes: CostPanel with live margin calculation → keep useLiveCalc hook; cost-box and cost-line CSS classes → Tailwind flex justify-between py-1 border-b
Target price and yield % inputs → shadcn Input with label; hook into parent form state via Controller or value/onChange props
Margin box color (red/amber/green based on marginPct) → Tailwind conditional bg-red-50/bg-amber-50/bg-green-50
Processing overhead hardcoded 8% → move to project settings or constants; expose as editable in Settings Phase C
Packaging cost hardcoded €0.65 → derive from actual MRP packaging cost sum from prod_detail / MRP tab
Revenue/kg calculation assumes 200g pack → make pack size dynamic from project.format field

label: allergen_cascade
translation_notes: 3-column cascade grid (RM / Process / FA Final) → CSS grid grid-cols-3 gap-4; each column is a shadcn Card

window.NPD_ALLERGEN_CASCADE → Server Component query: fa_allergen_rm (raw material allergens), fa_allergen_process (process additions), fa_allergen_override (manual overrides) joined into cascade view
SVG cascade diagram (static) → BL-NPD-05: should animate on refresh; production: use react-flow or custom SVG with animated paths; FA final box has 2px blue border
FA selector → shadcn Select; onChange triggers router.push with new faCode param; data fetched per-FA in Server Component
Refresh button → Server Action refreshAllergenCascade(faCode) + revalidatePath; shared with fa_technical_tab refresh action
Manual override badges (amber border) → filter cascade.final.contains where a.manual=true; Badge with border-amber-400 class
known_bugs: BL-NPD-05: AllergenCascade SVG diagram is static — should animate on refresh

label: compliance_docs_screen
translation_notes: window.NPD_DOCS[fa.fa_code] → Server Component query fa_docs WHERE fa_code=? ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC
File icon emoji 📄 → Lucide FileText icon; file link → presigned download URL from Server Action getDocDownloadUrl(docId)
Type badge → shadcn Badge variant='outline'; type from doc_types reference table
Download button → client-side window.open(presignedUrl); Delete button → Server Action deleteComplianceDoc(docId) with RBAC guard
Upload button → triggers doc_upload_modal via URL param ?modal=docUpload
Alert note about extended workflow deferred to Quality Phase C4 → shadcn Alert variant='info'

label: risk_register_screen
translation_notes: window.NPD_RISKS[fa.fa_code] → Server Component query fa_risks WHERE fa_code=? ORDER BY score DESC
Risk score badge (High/Med/Low threshold) → extract RiskScoreBadge(score) component; thresholds: score>=6 red, score>=3 amber, else gray
Status badge (Open/Mitigated/Closed) → shadcn Badge with three variants; map from risk.status enum column
Edit button → opens risk_add_modal in edit mode via URL param ?modal=riskAdd&riskId=R-001
Delete button (red) → Server Action deleteRisk(riskId) with RBAC guard + soft delete; Button variant='ghost' with text-red-500
Add risk button → URL param ?modal=riskAdd (no riskId = create mode)

label: nutrition_screen
translation_notes: Nutrition table per 100g + per portion → Server Component derives from formulation ingredients via nutrition DB lookup; static mock rows must be replaced
Status badge (OK / At limit) → shadcn Badge; 'At limit' maps to amber variant
Allergen declaration sub-table → query fa_allergen_cascade final + cross-contact from line history
Nutri-Score preview (A-E visual) → implement Nutri-Score algorithm server-side (energy, saturates, sugars, sodium, protein, fiber, F&V); display result with color scale
Run what-if button → triggers costing_screen what-if slider interaction; or opens a modal with scenario simulator
Export CSV + Generate label PDF → Server Actions; PDF via react-pdf or Puppeteer; CSV via streaming response

label: costing_screen
translation_notes: Waterfall cost chart (custom CSS .waterfall-bar) → production: use recharts BarChart with stacked bar or custom SVG waterfall; zero-dep prototype approach not accessible
Hardcoded steps (pork 82%, yield 22%, etc.) → derive from recipe ingredients (% × costPerKg) + yield from prod_detail + packaging from MRP tab
3-scenario margin table (pessimistic/target/optimistic) → compute server-side from target price parameter; pass 3 price points as query params
What-if sliders (range inputs) → shadcn Slider component; onChange updates local state for client-side margin recalc using useLiveCalc hook
Per-pack / per-batch toggle pills → URL param ?unit=kg|pack|batch; converts cost values via simple multiplier
Alert '7.5% below NPD minimum 15%' → derive threshold from settings/constants; format via next-intl

label: trial_screen
translation_notes: window.NPD_TRIALS → Server Component query trial_runs WHERE project_id=? ORDER BY date DESC
Result badge (pass/fail/in-progress) → shadcn Badge with three variants; map from trial.result enum column
Log new trial button → opens inline form (Sheet) or navigates to /trials/new with project pre-filled
Yield column with % formatting → display formatted value; null shown as '—' muted text
Technologist column → link to user profile or just display name string
Notes column → truncate with Tooltip for long text (shadcn Tooltip wrapping truncated span)

label: sensory_screen
translation_notes: Custom SVG radar chart (spider web) → production: use recharts RadarChart or visx/d3 radar; current hand-rolled SVG works but is not accessible or responsive
window.NPD_SENSORY → Server Component query sensory_results WHERE trial_id=? JOIN attributes
Score bar per attribute → shadcn Progress with conditional color (green>=7.5, amber>=6, red<6)
vs benchmark column → compute delta server-side from sensory_benchmarks table; color conditionally
Panelist comments → query sensory_comments WHERE trial_id=? ORDER BY panelist_id; render as quoted list
Export scores button → Server Action exportSensoryCSV(trialId)

label: approval_screen
translation_notes: Approval gates list (pass/warn/pending circles) → extract ApprovalGate component; circle status → shadcn Avatar-style circle with Lucide CheckCircle / AlertCircle / Circle icon
approvalMode prop ('multi' vs single) → derive from project.approval_mode enum in DB or settings/constants
Multi-step approval chain → query approval_steps WHERE project_id=? ORDER BY step_order; each step shows who/name/status/when
Submit for approval button → Server Action submitForApproval(projectId) that creates approval_step records, sends notifications (email via SMTP or outbox)
Step status badges (Approved/Awaiting/Pending) → shadcn Badge variants
approval-step CSS class with done/current/pending states → Tailwind conditional border-l-4 or left-border pattern

label: pilot_screen
translation_notes: Pilot run plan 4-column grid → Tailwind grid grid-cols-4 gap-4; each cell has label + value pattern; extract PilotDetailCell component
Material reservation table → Server Component query pilot_material_reservations WHERE pilot_id=?; status derived from available vs required comparison
Short material alert with 'Raise PO' link → shadcn Alert variant='warning'; Link triggers PO creation flow in Planning module
Pilot checklist (done/pending) → query pilot_checklist_items WHERE pilot_id=?; checkbox rendering with conditional strikethrough
Status badge (Reserved / Short) → shadcn Badge; 'Short' maps to amber variant with quantity diff shown
Scheduled pilot header alert → shadcn Alert variant='info'

label: handoff_screen
translation_notes: Handoff checklist (all checked) → query handoff_checklist_items WHERE project_id=?; derive done state from DB flags not hardcoded booleans
Destination BOM table → Server Component shows proposed BOM code (next available BOM-XXX from sequence), SKU, effective date
What happens on promote ordered list → shadcn Card with OrderedList; steps are static but BOM code is dynamic
Promote to production BOM button → Server Action promoteToProductionBOM(projectId): creates BOM record, activates SKU in Planning, schedules WO, archives NPD project; wrap in DB transaction
Export handoff packet button → Server Action generateHandoffPacketPDF(projectId) using react-pdf or Puppeteer
Ready to promote Alert → only shown when all handoff_checklist_items are checked; Server Component derives from DB state
